headline: Analysts Remain Bullish on Visa (V) Following Bridge Collaboration
summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) earns a place on our list of the 13 unrivaled stocks of the next 10 years. Over 90% of the covering analysts are optimistic about Visa Inc.
